title: The Indie AI Revolution
content:
Artificial intelligence is no longer just for big tech companies. Indie hackers and solo developers are now using AI APIs to build incredibly successful micro-startups. What used to require a team of machine learning engineers can now be implemented by a single creative developer in an afternoon.

This shift in power is creating a new wave of software where niche problems are solved elegantly by individuals who understand both the technology and the user. The barrier to entry has evaporated, and we are entering the golden age of indie software development powered by AI.
caption: How solo developers are leveraging AI to build incredible products.
